combined_text: Kid-Approved Prune Juice Smoothie (to help with constipation) Kid-Approved Prune Juice Smoothie (to help with constipation)A prune juice smoothie? Why would anyone want to drink one of those? Well, for our daughter, she doesn’t have much of a choice. She has struggled with chronic constipation for at least a year, and for her it’s either a laxative or a prune
